subcodes.first_line: The sacred Tree of Remembrance hath been raised up through this Name, whereby the Balance hath been established and the Straight Path laid down, O peoples of the earth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد ارتفعت سدره الذکر بهذا الاسم الذی به وضع المیزان و نصب الصراط یا اهل الارض
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
